requirement_topic.en: EPC Grid Connection — IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 Evidence and 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: EPC并网——IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: EPC併網——IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數

summary.en: Samoa electricity-system approvals are practically driven by the Office of the Regulator (OOTR) electricity oversight and Electric Power Corporation (EPC) utility connection review. Samoa does not appear to maintain a strong dedicated national standards body issuing PV inverter product certificates, so project specifications commonly lean on IEC evidence and Australia-New Zealand legacy practice. For grid-tied PV inverters, prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, model-specific protection settings, and commissioning records for Samoa's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid. The frequency matches China, but voltage differs from China's nominal 220/380 V.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚电力系统审批在实践中由监管办公室（OOTR）的电力监管和Electric Power Corporation（EPC）的公用事业接入审查主导。萨摩亚似乎没有签发光伏逆变器产品证书的强专门国家标准机构，因此项目规格通常依赖IEC证据及澳新历史实践。并网光伏逆变器应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、特定型号保护参数及针对萨摩亚230/400 V、50 Hz电网的调试记录。频率与中国相同，但电压不同于中国标称220/380 V。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞電力系統審批在實務中由監管辦公室（OOTR）的電力監管和Electric Power Corporation（EPC）的公用事業接入審查主導。薩摩亞似乎沒有簽發光伏逆變器產品證書的強專門國家標準機構，因此項目規格通常依賴IEC證據及澳新歷史實務。併網光伏逆變器應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、特定型號保護參數及針對薩摩亞230/400 V、50 Hz電網的調試記錄。頻率與中國相同，但電壓不同於中國標稱220/380 V。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Samoa Office of the Regulator electricity oversight and licence framework
Electric Power Corporation grid-connection and project technical review practice

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station connection, NB/T 32004 inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 inverter requirements, and domestic anti-islanding or protection test reports. These documents are based on Chinese grid assumptions and nominal 220/380 V, 50 Hz service under China's domestic framework. They do not automatically demonstrate compatibility with Samoa's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid or EPC project acceptance criteria.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408逆变器技术要求，以及国内防孤岛或保护测试报告。上述文件基于中国电网假设和国内框架下的220/380 V、50 Hz标称供电，不能自动证明与萨摩亚230/400 V、50 Hz电网或EPC项目验收标准兼容。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408逆變器技術要求，以及國內防孤島或保護測試報告。上述文件基於中國電網假設和國內框架下的220/380 V、50 Hz標稱供電，不能自動證明與薩摩亞230/400 V、50 Hz電網或EPC項目驗收標準相容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid certificates are not a substitute for Samoa project-level grid acceptance. Exporters should provide IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 reports for the exact model or model family, a settings file showing Samoa 230/400 V and 50 Hz protection thresholds, reconnection delays, frequency and voltage trip points, and commissioning tests witnessed or accepted by EPC. Do not claim voltage equivalence with China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches; Samoa nominal voltage differs.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证书不能替代萨摩亚项目级并网验收。出口商应提供涵盖具体型号或型号系列的IEC 62116和IEC 61727报告、显示萨摩亚230/400 V和50 Hz保护阈值的设置文件、重连延迟、频率及电压跳闸点，以及由EPC见证或接受的调试测试。不得声称与中国电压相同：只有50 Hz频率相同；萨摩亚标称电压不同。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證書不能替代薩摩亞項目級併網驗收。出口商應提供涵蓋具體型號或型號系列的IEC 62116和IEC 61727報告、顯示薩摩亞230/400 V和50 Hz保護閾值的設定文件、重連延遲、頻率及電壓跳脫點，以及由EPC見證或接受的調試測試。不得聲稱與中國電壓相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同；薩摩亞標稱電壓不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for EPC grid connection and OOTR-regulated electricity projects; exact documentary requirements should be confirmed project by project
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence may satisfy China grid operator requirements but is not automatically accepted for Samoa EPC grid connection

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Samoa as a project-review market: provide IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence plus EPC-specific firmware settings for 230/400 V at 50 Hz. China GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408 evidence can support the technical file but should not be presented as automatically accepted Samoa grid-connection evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将萨摩亚视为项目审查型市场：提供IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，并提供针对230/400 V、50 Hz的EPC特定固件设置。中国GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408证据可支持技术文件，但不应作为自动被萨摩亚接受的并网证据提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將薩摩亞視為項目審查型市場：提供IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，並提供針對230/400 V、50 Hz的EPC特定韌體設定。中國GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408證據可支持技術文件，但不應作為自動被薩摩亞接受的併網證據提交。

requirement_topic.en: Samoa Project Conditions — Island Grid, Cyclone Exposure, Salt Mist, and Apia Sea Freight
requirement_topic.zh: 萨摩亚项目条件——岛屿电网、气旋暴露、盐雾及阿皮亚海运
requirement_topic.zht: 薩摩亞項目條件——島嶼電網、氣旋暴露、鹽霧及阿皮亞海運

summary.en: Samoa is a Pacific small-island developing state with high renewable-energy ambitions and project procurement that often expects equipment to withstand coastal humidity, salt mist, cyclone exposure, logistics delays, and constrained island-grid operation. Grid-tied inverters should be specified with tropical-temperature derating, corrosion protection, enclosure ratings appropriate for coastal installations, surge protection, spare-parts planning, and sea-freight lead-time assumptions through Apia. These are usually project and utility acceptance requirements rather than a single national PV inverter certificate.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚是太平洋小岛屿发展中国家，具有较高可再生能源目标；项目采购通常预期设备能够承受沿海湿热、盐雾、气旋暴露、物流延误和受限岛屿电网运行。并网逆变器应规定热带温度降额、防腐蚀保护、适合沿海安装的外壳等级、浪涌保护、备件计划，以及经阿皮亚海运的交期假设。这些通常是项目和公用事业验收要求，而不是单一国家光伏逆变器证书。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞是太平洋小島嶼發展中國家，具有較高可再生能源目標；項目採購通常預期設備能夠承受沿海濕熱、鹽霧、氣旋暴露、物流延誤和受限島嶼電網運行。併網逆變器應規定熱帶溫度降額、防腐蝕保護、適合沿海安裝的外殼等級、浪湧保護、備件計畫，以及經阿皮亞海運的交期假設。這些通常是項目和公用事業驗收要求，而不是單一國家光伏逆變器證書。

standards_or_laws: Project procurement specifications for Samoa renewable-energy and EPC grid-connection projects
IEC 60068 environmental test series — temperature, damp heat, salt mist, and mechanical stress test methods where specified
IEC 61643 surge protective device coordination where specified by project design

summary.en: Chinese inverter datasheets and GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 reports may list operating temperature, humidity, ingress protection, and altitude ratings. They may not include Samoa-specific cyclone exposure, salt-mist corrosion class, tropical derating curves, surge-protection coordination, spare-parts availability, or sea-freight lead-time commitments needed by an island project owner or EPC utility review.
summary.zh: 中国逆变器数据表及GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004报告可能列明运行温度、湿度、防护等级和海拔额定值，但可能不包括萨摩亚特定的气旋暴露、盐雾腐蚀等级、热带降额曲线、浪涌保护协调、备件可获得性或岛屿项目业主及EPC公用事业审查所需的海运交期承诺。
summary.zht: 中國逆變器數據表及GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004報告可能列明運行溫度、濕度、防護等級和海拔額定值，但可能不包括薩摩亞特定的氣旋暴露、鹽霧腐蝕等級、熱帶降額曲線、浪湧保護協調、備件可獲得性或島嶼項目業主及EPC公用事業審查所需的海運交期承諾。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: domestic China evidence should be supplemented with Samoa project-environment evidence. Provide model-specific thermal derating curves at tropical ambient temperatures, enclosure and corrosion documentation for coastal salt-mist sites, surge-protection architecture, mounting and wind-loading assumptions coordinated with the project designer, and an Apia sea-freight spares plan. Where evidence is based only on standard factory datasheets, ask the project engineer whether additional IEC 60068 or corrosion testing is required.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内证据应补充萨摩亚项目环境证据。应提供特定型号在热带环境温度下的热降额曲线、沿海盐雾场地的外壳和防腐文件、浪涌保护架构、与项目设计方协调的安装及风荷载假设，以及阿皮亚海运备件计划。若证据仅基于标准工厂数据表，应向项目工程师确认是否需要额外IEC 60068或腐蚀测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內證據應補充薩摩亞項目環境證據。應提供特定型號在熱帶環境溫度下的熱降額曲線、沿海鹽霧場地的外殼和防腐文件、浪湧保護架構、與項目設計方協調的安裝及風荷載假設，以及阿皮亞海運備件計畫。若證據僅基於標準工廠數據表，應向項目工程師確認是否需要額外IEC 60068或腐蝕測試。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; often mandatory through EPC, owner, donor, or utility procurement documents rather than a single Samoa national product standard
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese environmental ratings are useful technical inputs but do not automatically satisfy Samoa project-owner environmental and logistics requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Add Samoa-specific environmental and logistics evidence to the inverter technical file: cyclone and coastal salt-mist assumptions, tropical derating, surge protection, and Apia sea-freight spares planning. Chinese GB/T or NB/T inverter reports do not by themselves close these project-level gaps.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应在逆变器技术文件中加入萨摩亚特定环境和物流证据：气旋及沿海盐雾假设、热带降额、浪涌保护和阿皮亚海运备件计划。中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器报告本身不能弥合这些项目级差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應在逆變器技術文件中加入薩摩亞特定環境和物流證據：氣旋及沿海鹽霧假設、熱帶降額、浪湧保護和阿皮亞海運備件計畫。中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器報告本身不能彌合這些項目級差距。
